channel.desc: Channel to remove star from, or channel where the message to remove star from was posted (used with `timestamp`). One of `file`, `file_comment`, `channel`, or the combination of `channel` and `timestamp` must be specified.

file.desc: File to remove star from. One of `file`, `file_comment`, `channel`, or the combination of `channel` and `timestamp` must be specified.

file_comment.desc: File comment to remove star from. One of `file`, `file_comment`, `channel`, or the combination of `channel` and `timestamp` must be specified.

timestamp.desc: Timestamp of the message to remove star from. One of `file`, `file_comment`, `channel`, or the combination of `channel` and `timestamp` must be specified.

desc: Removes a saved item (star) from an item.

errors.channel_not_found: Channel, private group, or DM specified by `channel` does not exist
errors.file_comment_not_found: File comment specified by `file_comment` does not exist.
errors.file_not_found: File specified by `file` does not exist.
errors.message_not_found: Message specified by `channel` and `timestamp` does not exist.
errors.not_starred: The specified item is not currently starred by the authenticated user.
